articles.title_en: Two boys rescued from Venezuela earthquake rubble after days of being trapped
articles.title_ru: Two boys rescued from Venezuela earthquake rubble after days of being trapped
articles.preview_en: Rescuers spent six hours carefully digging to reach one of the boys, as many residents continue searching through the rubble by hand, still waiting for heavy machinery to arrive.
